_comment: Maps best practice check IDs to Sophos KB articles and remediation steps. Last updated: 2026-03.

bp-admin-wan.howToFix: Disable WAN admin access. Navigate to Administration > Device access and uncheck HTTPS and SSH for the WAN zone.

bp-mfa.howToFix: Enable MFA (OTP) for admin accounts under Authentication > Multi-factor authentication. Distribute tokens to all admins.

bp-logging.howToFix: Configure syslog or Central reporting under System services > Log settings. Ensure firewall log and IPS log are enabled.

bp-ssl-tls.consolePath: Rules and policies > SSL/TLS inspection rules
bp-ssl-tls.howToFix: Enable SSL/TLS inspection. Create a rule under Rules and policies > SSL/TLS inspection rules covering web traffic zones.

bp-snmp.howToFix: If SNMP is enabled, ensure it uses SNMPv3 with authentication and encryption. Disable if not required.

bp-any-service.howToFix: Review firewall rules using 'Any' service. Replace with specific service objects to reduce attack surface.

bp-disabled-rules.howToFix: Remove or review disabled firewall rules. Disabled rules indicate potential misconfigurations or leftover policies.

bp-broad-rules.howToFix: Tighten broad 'Any-to-Any' rules. Use specific source/destination zones and networks instead.

bp-ips.howToFix: Enable IPS policies on LAN-to-WAN and WAN-to-LAN traffic. Apply recommended IPS policy or custom policy.

bp-dos-syn-flood.consolePath: Protect > Intrusion prevention > DoS & spoof protection
bp-dos-syn-flood.howToFix: Enable SYN flood protection under Intrusion prevention > DoS & spoof protection. Apply to all applicable interfaces.

bp-dos-spoof-prevention.consolePath: Protect > Intrusion prevention > DoS & spoof protection
bp-dos-spoof-prevention.howToFix: Enable IP spoof prevention. This validates source IPs against routing tables to prevent spoofed packets.

bp-vpn-weak-crypto.howToFix: Remove DES, 3DES, and MD5 from IPsec profiles. Use AES-256 with SHA-256 or stronger.

bp-vpn-pfs.howToFix: Enable Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) in all IPsec profiles using DH Group 14 or higher.

bp-vpn-cert-auth.howToFix: Switch VPN authentication from pre-shared key (PSK) to digital certificates for stronger security.

bp-xops-feeds.consolePath: Active threat response > Sophos X-Ops threat feeds
bp-xops-feeds.howToFix: Enable Sophos X-Ops threat intelligence feeds under Active threat response. Requires compatible licence.

bp-heartbeat.howToFix: Enable Security Heartbeat and create heartbeat-based firewall rules. Requires Sophos endpoint protection on clients.

bp-mdr-feeds.consolePath: Active threat response > MDR threat feeds
bp-mdr-feeds.howToFix: Enable MDR threat feeds to receive threat intelligence from Sophos MDR team. Requires MDR subscription.

bp-ndr.howToFix: Enable NDR Essentials integration for network detection and response capabilities.

bp-webfilter.howToFix: Enable web filtering with appropriate URL category policies. Block high-risk categories at minimum.

bp-appcontrol.howToFix: Enable application control and create policies to manage high-risk applications (P2P, anonymizers).

bp-highrisk-categories.consolePath: Protect > Web > Policies > URL category groups
bp-highrisk-categories.howToFix: Block high-risk web categories (malware, phishing, botnets, spam URLs) in web filter policies.

bp-sandboxing.howToFix: Enable Sophos Sandstorm (Zero-Day Protection) for web and email traffic. Requires appropriate licence.

bp-av-scanning.howToFix: Enable dual AV engine scanning for HTTP/S and SMTP traffic under Advanced threat protection.

bp-central-mgmt.howToFix: Register the firewall with Sophos Central for cloud management, monitoring, and group policy. Navigate to Sophos Central > Firewall Management.

bp-dns-protection.howToFix: Enable DNS Protection under Web protection. This filters DNS queries against Sophos threat intelligence.

bp-password-complexity.howToFix: Enable password complexity requirements under Admin settings. Set minimum length to 12+ characters.

bp-login-lockout.howToFix: Enable login lockout after failed attempts. Set to lock after 3-5 failed attempts for 15+ minutes.

bp-login-disclaimer.howToFix: Enable a login disclaimer/banner that warns unauthorized users. This is a compliance requirement in many frameworks.

bp-hotfix.howToFix: Enable automatic hotfix installation under Backup & firmware > Firmware to receive critical security patches.

bp-pattern-update.howToFix: Ensure automatic pattern updates are enabled for AV, IPS, and application signatures.

bp-backup.howToFix: Configure scheduled automated backups. Use FTP/SFTP or email delivery. Test restore procedures periodically.

bp-notification.howToFix: Configure email notifications for critical events (system alerts, IPS events, authentication failures).

bp-ntp.howToFix: Configure NTP time synchronization under Administration > Time. Use reliable NTP servers for accurate logging.

bp-auth-encryption.howToFix: Use LDAPS or STARTTLS for Active Directory/LDAP authentication. Avoid plaintext LDAP binds.

bp-sync-app-control.howToFix: Enable Synchronized Application Control to automatically detect and classify applications via endpoint heartbeat.

bp-ha-configured.howToFix: Configure HA (Active-Passive or Active-Active) for redundancy. Requires a second firewall of the same model.
